Mike Tannenbaum’s suggestion of a reunion with Jim Harbaugh and the Chargers adds intrigue, though questions remain about fit and role behind Justin Herbert. For now, Minnesota appears more likely to let the situation play out, but the pressure to make a clear decision is steadily increasing.

description: India has accused Pakistan of fabricating Islamophobia narratives at the UN, questioning Islamabad's treatment of minorities and its actions against Afghanistan. Ambassador Parvathaneni Harish urged the UN to address all religious discrimination, not just one faith, highlighting India's large Muslim population and pluralistic ethos. He warned against weaponizing religion for political gain.

description: Meta's potential workforce reduction of up to 20% is viewed by analysts not as a setback, but as a strategic move to become an AI-first organization. This restructuring aims to leverage AI for significant cost and performance advantages, potentially creating an insurmountable competitive edge. The company's substantial AI investments and previous successes in efficiency suggest this could redefine industry standards.

He contrasted this with Zerodha's Kite app, which requests zero permissions, highlighting the Principle of Least Privilege and SEBI's strong two-factor authentication as enabling security without intrusive data collection.

Employees are now compelled to bring packed lunches, impacting thousands who rely on office cafeterias, especially those in PGs and hostels with limited options.

title: Meta unit makes humans answer for AI agents; adds 13+ age rule
description: Meta's acquisition of AI agent social network Moltbook has led to significant changes in its terms of service. Users are now solely responsible for their AI agents' actions, a shift from Moltbook's previous stance. A new 13-year-old age requirement, or parental consent, has also been implemented, aligning with Meta's policies.

title: Cardi B reveals hospitalization after cheating, Diggs attempts romance
description: Stefon Diggs, the popular wide receiver in the league, is facing a tough time in his career after the New England Patriots released him recently, as fans continue to troll him for allegedly cheating on Cardi B even as she gave birth to their child. Amid all the mess, Cardi B's statements about being cheated on have resurfaced and sparked panic.
